description: error messages that use internal identifiers instead of human language
input:
class Payment < ApplicationRecord
  validate :card_must_be_valid

  private

  def card_must_be_valid
    result = PaymentGateway.validate(card_number)
    errors.add(:card_number, result.error_code) unless result.success?
    # error_code might be: "insufficient_funds", "card_expired", "invalid_cvv"
  end
end
